---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new reusable skill, workflow, template, or repository improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Request Summary

Describe the capability you want to add.

## Why It Matters

Explain the problem this would solve across projects.

## Proposed Scope

- Asset type: skill / workflow / template / workspace / script / docs
- Expected users:
- Expected output:

## Reuse Considerations

Explain why this should live in a shared reusable repository rather than a single project repository.

## Additional Notes

Add examples, references, or boundaries. Do not include private customer data.
